title: calytrix megaphylla
intro: Calytrix megaphylla, also known as the white starflower, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Calytrix megaphylla has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
